name: CNS Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview CNS Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (CNS, the Company, we, us, or our) is a biotechnology company focused on developing innovative therapies for serious diseases in neurology and oncology. Together, these therapeutic areas represent hundreds of billions of dollars in annual global pharmaceutical spending, encompass some of the most prevalent and difficult to treat diseases affecting humanity, and are characterized by significant unmet medical need.
